## Problem

What package typing problem should this solve?

-- rough API or type-function shape

## Ownership Check

- Is this compile-time type knowledge?
- Does this belong in TypeManager instead of Registry, Serialization, Pipeline, Dispatch, or Descriptors?
- Can this be analyzer-validated without casts or `any`?

## Alternatives

What simpler or generated/static surface could solve this?
